title: Hi! I'm Fabiola Suárez
subtitle: Full Stack Developer
project_ecommerce_description: Full e-commerce interface with product listing, cart and checkout flow built with React.
project_budget_description: Budget management app with CRUD operations and state management.
project_invitationCreator_description: App for creating and managing customized invitations.
contact_subtitle: Thanks for making it this far!
contact_text_1: I'm motivated by innovative, creative projects with real impact. If you have an idea where you think I could contribute, an opportunity where I could be part of the team, or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out.
phrase_03: It's not difficult, it's just new
phrase_04: If you weren't ready, you wouldn't have the opportunity
phrase_05: You don't need more motivation; you need better habits
phrase_06: There are many first times still ahead
phrase_07: If you're going to dream, dream big
phrase_08: It's a privilege to be here and now
about_1: The core. I am myself. My personality, my logic and my love for clean code.
about_2: Creativity and relaxed approaches to solving complex problems.
about_3: Solid backend + attractive frontend = perfect balance.
experience_1_description: Worked on the development of digital banking solutions for financial institutions, contributing to both redesign and greenfield implementation projects. Focused on building and optimizing reusable components, integrating services, improving user experience, and collaborating on front-end architecture decisions within Agile teams.
experience_2_description: Contributed to the redesign of Bancor’s digital banking platform by developing and optimizing reusable components, resolving issues, and integrating services into an existing architecture, improving product usability and user experience.
experience_3_description: Provided support to students in a full-stack web development bootcamp, assisting with technical questions, debugging code, and offering guidance on best practices and project implementation. Collaborated with over 20 students to strengthen their understanding of core concepts and improve knowledge retention, while proposing group dynamics that encouraged collaboration and meaningful peer connections.
experience_4_description: Developed a collaborative platform designed to connect developers through task sharing, real-time chat, and pair programming features. Worked as part of a 8-person Agile SCRUM team, applying full-stack development skills and implementing features using technologies such as Socket.IO, Nodemailer, Chakra UI, and Google Cloud.
experience_5_description: Co-founded a cinnamon rolls venture during the pandemic, overseeing all aspects of the business, including production, product development, marketing, sales, and customer service. We supplied multiple coffee shops and built strong demand through Instagram.
experience_6_description: Customer service, organization of events and use of the English language to serve foreign clients.
study_1_desc: Completed a University Technical Degree in Programming, building a strong foundation in software development, problem-solving, systems analysis, and application design. Developed technical, teamwork, and communication skills through hands-on projects and collaborative methodologies.
study_2_desc: Completed an intensive and immersive full-stack software development program focused on building modern web applications. Gained hands-on experience in front-end and back-end development using technologies such as JavaScript, React, Redux, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, SQL, and PostgreSQL, while applying Agile methodologies, testing, data structures, and software development best practices.
study_3_title: Bachelor’s Degree in Information Systems for Economic Organizations
study_3_desc: Completed coursework in Sociology, Economics, Algebra, Mathematical Analysis, Social Science Methodology, and General Economic and Social History.
